title: heteropappus rupicola
intro: Heteropappus rupicola, also known as Tibetan mountain saxifrage or mountain rock saxifrage, is a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. Native to the mountainous regions of the Tibetan Plateau and parts of Central Asia, it has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Heteropappus rupicola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support kidney function, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, with the leaves and stems being used to make traditional medicines in various forms, including dried powders and capsules.
